items.name: access-gate-core
items.title: Access Gate Core
items.description: Framework-agnostic hash/session/storage/verify logic. Installed automatically as a dependency of every React block — install directly only if you're building a custom framework binding.
items.docs: These files use explicit `.ts` extensions in their relative imports. If your TypeScript config reports "An import path can only end with a '.ts' extension when 'allowImportingTsExtensions' is enabled," add `"allowImportingTsExtensions": true` to your tsconfig.json's compilerOptions.

items.name: access-gate-types
items.title: Access Gate Types
items.description: Shared config/defaults/label types used by every React block. Installed automatically — not meant to be added on its own.

items.name: access-gate-hook
items.title: useAccessGate
items.description: The headless session/verification hook every stateful block is built on. Installed automatically — use it directly only if you're building a fully custom PIN UI.

items.name: cx-util
items.title: cx (classname helper)
items.description: Tiny local classname joiner used across blocks. Installed automatically.

items.name: gate-wrapper
items.title: Gate Wrapper
items.description: The shared outer-positioning primitive (full-page centered vs. inline) every visible block composes on. Use it directly to build a fully custom gate layout.

items.name: pin-input
items.title: PIN Input
items.description: Masked PIN/passphrase input with paste support, show/hide toggle, and accessible loading/error states. No verification logic of its own.

items.name: access-gate
items.title: Access Gate
items.description: The main gate: renders children when unlocked, otherwise a PIN prompt. Local SHA-256 verification by default; pass a `verify` function for server-mode protection.

items.name: protected-route
items.title: Protected Route
items.description: `<AccessGate>` shaped for route-level guarding (a React Router `element`, a layout redirect guard), with an optional `unauthorizedFallback` for routes that shouldn't show an inline PIN prompt.

items.name: protected-layout
items.title: Protected Layout
items.description: `<AccessGate>` shaped for a full-page shell (a Next.js layout.tsx): header/footer render even while locked, so persistent site chrome survives the gate.

items.name: unlock-dialog
items.title: Unlock Dialog
items.description: A non-dismissable modal PIN prompt — no backdrop click, no Escape-to-close. Composable standalone, or used by Protected Modal.

items.name: protected-modal
items.title: Protected Modal
items.description: Content stays mounted (blurred and inert) behind a modal Unlock Dialog instead of being replaced outright — useful when the protected content's layout should stay stable underneath the prompt.

items.name: session-provider
items.title: Session Provider
items.description: Shares one useAccessGate session across a tree, so a gate, a Logout Button, and a Session Timeout Banner all read and act on the same unlock state.

items.name: session-timeout-banner
items.title: Session Timeout Banner
items.description: Warns before the shared session expires, with a one-click way to log out immediately instead of waiting for automatic expiry. Requires a Session Provider.

items.name: access-receipt
items.title: Access Receipt
items.description: A small session audit strip shown after unlock — timestamp, storage mode, timeout, and verification strategy. Requires a Session Provider.

items.name: access-denied-screen
items.title: Access Denied Screen
items.description: A static "you don't have access" view with no PIN form in it at all — distinct from the PIN entry UI. Use it as a custom unauthorizedFallback or any hard denial state.

items.name: verification-loader
items.title: Verification Loader
items.description: A small presentational spinner + label for the in-flight verification moment, for a fully custom PIN form built directly on useAccessGate.

items.name: logout-button
items.title: Logout Button
items.description: Reads the shared session from a Session Provider and clears it on click.

items.name: protected-card
items.title: Protected Card
items.description: A card-shaped gate for protecting one section of a page rather than the whole viewport — locked content stays mounted and blurred behind an Unlock button so the card's size never jumps.

items.name: standalone-gate
items.title: Standalone Gate
items.description: The fastest path to a working gate: wrap your app, pass a hash, done. A deliberately smaller prop surface than Access Gate.

items.name: embedded-gate
items.title: Embedded Gate
items.description: Access Gate fixed to the inline shell — sits naturally inside an existing layout (a sidebar widget, a section of a longer page) instead of taking over the full viewport.

items.name: access-gate-template
items.title: Access Gate Template
items.description: A complete, single-file "restricted access" screen — full-page dark backdrop, centered card, segmented code entry, support link, footer help text. Everything in one component.

items.name: minimal-access-template
items.title: Minimal Access Template
items.description: The leanest restricted-access screen — a single masked field, a small plain card, no segmented boxes and no default footer copy. Everything in one component.

items.name: branded-access-template
items.title: Branded Access Template
items.description: A split-screen, logo-forward restricted-access screen — brand panel on one side, code entry on the other. The brand panel collapses on small screens.

items.name: modal-access-template
items.title: Modal Access Template
items.description: Gates one section of an already-visible page — the content stays mounted and blurred behind a centered dialog instead of disappearing entirely.
